name: oppc-crm
description: OPCC CRM — Multi-user CRM on Cloudflare

scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
scripts.db:init: cd api && npx wrangler d1 execute oppc-crm-db --file=src/db/schema.sql
scripts.db:seed: cd api && npx wrangler d1 execute oppc-crm-db --file=src/db/seed.sql
